decks.notes: This deck focuses on generating mana quickly and efficiently through cards like Dark Ritual and Lion's Eye Diamond to cast multiple spells in a single turn. The goal is to assemble a combination of cards that allows the player to generate a large storm count, enabling a lethal Tendrils of Agony finish. Burning Wish provides additional flexibility by allowing the player to search for specific cards in their sideboard, while Echo of Eons and Song of Creation provide additional resources and card advantage to keep the combo going. The deck also includes disruption in the form of Hexing Squelcher and Veil of Summer to protect the combo.

The main concept of this deck is to aggressively control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy while maintaining tempo through efficient spells and creatures. By utilizing powerful cards like Brainstorm, Force of Will, and Lightning Bolt alongside threats like Murktide Regent and Dragon's Rage Channeler, the deck aims to pressure the opponent while maintaining control over the game. The inclusion of disruptive elements like Daze and Wasteland further adds to the deck's ability to disrupt the opponent's plans, allowing the UR Tempo archetype to dictate the pace of the game and secure a victory.

This deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Atraxa, then bringing them back into play using cards like Animate Dead and Reanimate. It also includes disruptive elements like Unmask and Cabal Therapy to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck aims to win the game quickly by reanimating threatening creatures and overwhelming the opponent with powerful plays. The inclusion of cards like Raph & Mikey, Troublemakers and Raucous Theater add additional chaos and disruption to the deck's strategy.

The deck revolves around quickly putting powerful creatures like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn onto the battlefield through cards like Show and Tell and Sneak Attack, while also utilizing cards like Omniscience and Atraxa, Grand Unifier to create big explosive plays. The deck also includes powerful interaction with counterspells like Flusterstorm and Force of Will to protect its game plan. The mana base is structured to support the fast and explosive plays the deck aims to make, allowing for consistent and powerful combo potential.

This deck aims to quickly assemble a combo using Doomsday to win the game. It utilizes various cards like Dark Ritual, Lotus Petal, and Lion's Eye Diamond to generate mana and cast Doomsday. Then, the player uses Doomsday to stack their library in a way that allows them to win the game with Thassa's Oracle. The deck includes disruption like Force of Will and Thoughtseize to protect the combo, as well as card draw and filtering tools like Brainstorm and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student to find the necessary pieces.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly and efficiently reanimate powerful creatures such as Griselbrand and Archon of Cruelty using cards like Reanimate, Shallow Grave, and Animate Dead. The deck also utilizes disruption cards like Cabal Therapy, Thoughtseize, and Unmask to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Additionally, the deck has access to mana acceleration through cards like Dark Ritual and Lotus Petal to allow for explosive plays. Overall, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures and disrupt their strategy to secure victory.

This deck aims to assemble a fast and aggressive game plan by utilizing cheap threats like Delver of Secrets and Dragon's Rage Channeler. It aims to maintain tempo through disruption with cards like Force of Will and Daze while also generating card advantage with cards like Mishra's Bauble and Ponder. The deck also includes powerful finishers like Murktide Regent and Thundering Falls to close out games quickly. By efficiently utilizing its mana base and disruptive elements, this deck looks to control the early game and transition into a powerful mid to late-game threat.

The deck focuses on using efficiency and disruption to control the pace of the game while applying pressure with aggressive creatures like Delver of Secrets and Murktide Regent. By combining cheap spells like Lightning Bolt and Force of Will with powerful threats, the deck aims to quickly close out games before the opponent can establish their own game plan. Utilizing card advantage and tempo plays, the deck seeks to maintain a constant stream of pressure while disrupting the opponent's strategy.

The main concept of this deck is to establish early control and disrupt your opponent's game plan while also applying pressure with aggressive creatures. The deck aims to lock down the opponent's spells with cards like Archon of Emeria and Chalice of the Void, while also utilizing powerful creatures like Anointed Peacekeeper and Elite Spellbinder to quickly close out the game. With efficient mana acceleration from cards like Chrome Mox and Lotus Petal, the deck can quickly deploy its threats and overwhelm the opponent before they have a chance to recover.

The deck focuses on establishing a lock on the opponent by using powerful artifacts like Trinisphere and Urza's Saga, combined with land acceleration from Urza's Workshop and Ancient Tomb. It aims to control the game through disruption cards like Disruptor Flute and Karn, the Great Creator, while also utilizing powerful win conditions like Ugin, the Eye of the Storms and Emrakul, the Aeons Torn. The key strategy is to establish a board presence and lock down the opponent's options, leading to a controlled victory through the use of artifacts and powerful threats.

This deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and efficient card draw. The goal is to answer your opponent's threats while building up your own resources and eventually overwhelming them with powerful spells and card advantage. The inclusion of Yorion, Sky Nomad as a companion allows for even more value and flexibility in the late game. With a mix of lands, creatures, and spells, this deck aims to outmaneuver and outlast opponents in a Legacy 1 vs 1 format.

The main concept of the deck is to quickly fill up the graveyard with powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Archon of Cruelty, then bring them back onto the battlefield using spells like Reanimate and Animate Dead. The deck relies on fast mana generation with cards like Dark Ritual and Lotus Petal to quickly get these creatures into play. The inclusion of disruptive spells like Unmask and Thoughtseize helps protect the combo and disrupt opposing strategies. The deck also has some alternative win conditions with cards like Raph & Mikey, Troublemakers and Atraxa, Grand Unifier.

The deck focuses on quickly deploying threats while disrupting the opponent with countermagic and land destruction. It aims to pressure the opponent with a mix of efficient creatures like Dragon's Rage Channeler and Murktide Regent, while using cards like Brainstorm and Mishra's Bauble to maintain card advantage and find key pieces. The deck also uses efficient removal spells like Lightning Bolt and Unholy Heat to eliminate opposing threats. Overall, the deck seeks to maintain control of the board and outpace the opponent with a proactive game plan.

The main concept of this deck is to use powerful mana acceleration and control tools to quickly assemble the Cloudpost / Tron lands combo, enabling the player to cast massive threats and powerful artifacts ahead of schedule. The deck focuses on using cards like Urza's Tower, Grim Monolith, and Candelabra of Tawnos to ramp up mana production, while also disrupting opponents with Kozilek's Command and Warping Wail. Karn, the Great Creator and Ugin, Eye of the Storms provide additional threats and utility, while The One Ring and Planar Nexus offer additional win conditions.

This deck aims to quickly put powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Emrakul, the Aeons Torn onto the battlefield using cards like Show and Tell and Sneak Attack. It utilizes card draw and manipulation spells like Ponder and Brainstorm to find its key combo pieces, while also running disruption like Force of Will and Flusterstorm to protect its game plan. The deck's goal is to overwhelm the opponent with massive threats ahead of schedule, forcing them to deal with threats they may not have the resources to handle.

The deck focuses on assembling a powerful combo utilizing Mystic Forge and various artifacts to generate mana and card advantage. By utilizing cards like Karn, the Great Creator and Manifold Key, the deck can create a loop of casting spells from the top of the library to generate a strong board presence. Additionally, the deck includes disruption in the form of cards like Pithing Needle and Urza's Saga to control the opponent's game plan. Overall, the deck aims to control the game and win through a combination of resource generation and powerful artifact synergies.
